arts.ttl: Man United leading race to sign “very special” 28-G/A star on Liverpool radar
arts.sum: Manchester United are keen on signing the Lyon attacking midfielder Rayan Cherki at the end of the season, and they will face competition from Liverpool. The 21-year-old has been exceptional for the French outfit and he has 10 goals and 18 assist in all competitions. He has impressed in Ligue 1 and in the Europa […] The post Man United leading race to sign “very special” 28-G/A star on Liverpool radar appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Newcastle v Man Utd team news: Gordon a sub, Onana dropped

arts.ttl: Man United goalkeeper Andre Onana left out of Premier League game against Newcastle
arts.sum: Andre Onana was left out of Manchester United’s squad for Sunday’s Premier League game against Newcastle following the goalkeeper’s latest high-profile errors for the club. “There’s nothing I can say to Andre in this moment that would help him,” United head coach Ruben Amorim said after that game.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim breaks silence on Andre Onana omission from Manchester United squad vs Newcastle
arts.sum: Andre Onana has been omitted from the matchday squad for Man United's Premier League clash with Newcastle United at St James' Park.

arts.ttl: Who is Harry Amass? Manchester United youngster given chance to impress vs Newcastle

arts.ttl: Newcastle v Manchester United: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Updates from the 4.30pm BST kick-off at St James’ Park Premier League table | Top scorers | Email Tim Liverpool have beaten West Ham 2-1, so they are 13 points ahead of Arsenal and all they have to do now is win two of their last six games. Or draw the lot of them. Chelsea have drawn 2-2 with Ipswich, so they are fifth, tucked between Man City and Aston Villa. But Newcastle can leapfrog all three if they win today. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Man Utd set for €45m cash INJECTION
arts.sum: Man Utd are in line for a massive cash injection as the Saudi Pro League prepares a €90 million bid for Mason Greenwood . Greenwood left Man Utd for Marseille this summer, as the French side paid €26 million, with an additional €5m in add-ons and 50 per cent sell-on clause.

arts.ttl: 'People annoy me - and he still annoys me!' | Keane on his red card against Newcastle
arts.sum: Roy Keane reflected on his red card against Newcastle in 2001 where he threw the ball at Alan Shearer following a late Wes Brown own goal.
